scenarios.title: Damage from unauthorized repair attempt
scenarios.description: Customer attempted to replace the iPhone battery themselves, causing internal damage. Device no longer powers on after the repair attempt.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to damage caused by service (including upgrades and expansions) if such was performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider (AASP).
Do not open the Covered iPhone. Opening the Covered iPhone may cause damage that is not covered by this Plan.

scenarios.reasoning: The damage was caused by an unauthorized repair attempt, which is explicitly excluded from coverage under section 4.2(ii)(d). The policy also warns that opening the device may void coverage for resulting damage. No service fee applies and this does not count toward any accidental damage limits.
